title: Slovakian Apple Crumble (Vegan)
description: A delicious and warm vegan dessert featuring caramelized apples topped with a crunchy oat crumble.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine sliced apples and caramelized.
In a separate bowl, mix together oats, salt, and sugar.
Add the crumble mixture to the apple mixture and toss until well combined.
Transfer the apple mixture to a baking dish.
In a small bowl, mix together flour, sugar, and crumble.
Add the crumble mixture on top of the apple mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
